#  Edit Drawing Markups (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To edit any markups on both the 'Personal' and 'Published' layers,_ 'Admin' permissions on the project's Drawings tool.  
_Note_ : 'Standard' users can only edit personal and published markups that they have created.
    * Published markups can only be deleted by users with ‘Admin’ permissions on the Drawings tool, unless a user is [granted specific permissions to delete published markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups).
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Any changes made to the markups will automatically be updated on the drawing's related layer.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on the Procore Android app.
  2. Tap the relevant drawing.
  3. Tap the markup that you want to edit.
  4. While the markup is selected, you can perform the following actions:
     * **Link items** : Tap **Link** and select the item that you want to link to the markup.   
_Note:_ This option is not available for all item types.
     * **Copy and paste the markup** :  
_Note:_ You can copy and paste the following markup types: Pen, Highlight, Cloud, Box, Oval, Arrow, Line, Double Arrow, and Text.* Using **Copy** action:1. Tap **Copy** on the markup.2. Press and hold the markup to get the paste option. Tap **Paste**. 
#####  Note
This action deselects the previous markup. The system pastes the markup automatically in the exact coordinates where you pressed and held. The 'Exceeded Maximum Amount of Markups' error banner appears if you attempt to copy more than 100 markups.
* Using **Pin** :1. Tap the desired item pin **Copy** using the horizontal ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8b7d3075c3f6ddd4d400a1c0efff6336/81c91b3794f404b6f907eb9ddb4364d8/icon-ellipsis-options-menu3.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon.3. Move the pin to the area of the drawing where you want to copy it to.4. Long-press and release to get the paste option. Tap **Paste**. This will paste the pin to the desired drawing.
     * **Duplicate the markup** :* Using **Duplicate** action: Tap **Duplicate** for the selected markup. The duplicated markup is automatically selected, allowing you to move it to the desired location within the drawing.* Using **Pin** : Tap the pin 
     * **Resize the markup** : Drag the corners of the markup to adjust the size and shape.
     * **Move the markup** : Drag the markup to a different area of the drawing.
     * **Delete the markup** : Tap **Delete** to delete the markup.


## See Also
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Mark up a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android)
  * [Search for and Filter Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-drawings-android)
title: Edit Drawing Markups (Android)
description: How to publish drawing markups using Procore's Drawings tool on an Android device.
